3158110.name: Dino Age: Dinosaur Survival Game
3158110.description:
⚠️ NOTE: THIS IS THE LEGACY PROTOTYPE (2024)

You are viewing the "Origins" version of Dino Age. This game represents the first steps of our journey. It is an older, unpolished prototype that we are keeping available for free as a "time capsule" for our community.

Looking for the new, polished RPG? The Dino Age universe has evolved. Experience the new story, improved combat, and hand-crafted world in our upcoming free prologue: 👉 CLICK HERE to Wishlist Dino Age: The First Fracture

ABOUT DINO AGE: ORIGINS

Where it all began. Before the Time Fractures were stabilized, there was this ambitious survival prototype.

In this legacy version, you take on the role of the original explorer concept. During an investigation of a newly discovered ruin in a dense jungle, a mysterious phenomenon catapults you millions of years back in time. This was our team's first attempt at building the Dino Age.

THE ORIGINAL SURVIVAL EXPERIENCE

Stranded and unarmed amidst a prehistoric landscape, this version tests your patience and grit in a raw, open sandbox environment.

  • Classic Survival: Start from scratch. Adapt to your surroundings, craft basic tools, weapons, and shelters.

  • The First Ruins: Discover the early concepts of the "Fracture Ruins." Scattered across the map, these locations hold the key to impacting the dinosaur population.

  • Open Exploration: Traverse a sprawling expanse of forests, mountains, and plains. Please note: As a legacy title, this world is less detailed than our newer titles.

WHY PLAY THIS VERSION?

We have made this version Free to Play to honor our history.

  • See the Evolution: Compare this prototype with Dino Age: The First Fracture to see how far the game mechanics, art, and storytelling have come.

  • No Hand-Holding: This represents a tougher, clunkier era of survival gameplay.

Can you survive the glitches and the dinosaurs in the version that started it all?

THE FUTURE IS HERE

If you want the true vision of Dino Age—featuring the story of Owen, fluid combat, skill trees (Cooking, Hatching, Crafting), and a living world—please head over to our main page.

👉 CLICK HERE to Wishlist Dino Age: The First Fracture
